name: recoil_state_main_menu_transition_scalar_deleting_destructor
description: RecoilStateMainMenuTransition::ScalarDeletingDestructor runs the transition destructor, conditionally frees this when bit 0 of flags is set, and returns this.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the recoil_state_main_menu_transition VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly and decompilation for 0x415190 validate the destructor call, flags bit-0 delete branch, returned self pointer, and thiscall callee cleanup for the flags argument.
The native smoke verifies the non-deleting path returns this and restores the base vtable through the destructor.
The native smoke verifies the deleting path calls the scalar deleting destructor on heap storage and still returns the original this pointer.
